author: jsign
content: Extra note 1: R2 bucket or `glamsterdam-devnet-6` prob soon -- maybe first want to see these usual tests how it works for guests whenever they are `devnet-6` ready which might take some work for you. But you can assume will eventually happen (I can keep `devnet-5` R2 bucket alive, so won't disappear).

author: jsign
content: Extra note 2: benchmark fixtures filling with Geth is still in the radar. Geth merged [a fix](https://github.com/ethereum/go-ethereum/pull/35256) I did yesterday. Want to see if their `glamsterdam-devnet-6` will upstream it, or I'll have to do my own fork to cherry pick or similar. Let's wait a bit, but after some point I might do a v0.5.1 that will also contain benchmark fixtures filled as assets.
